title: Nx TypeScript Application (no bundler)
description: Create a TypeScript Node application built with tsc (no bundler). Optional fastify framework and Dockerfile.

name.description: The short name of the application (also used as @<scope>/<name>).
name.x-prompt: What name would you like to use for the app?

directory.description: The directory to create the application in. Defaults to apps/<name>.

x-prompt.message: Which framework do you want to use?

docker.description: Add a Dockerfile and tag the project deployable:docker. @nx/docker plugin will infer docker:build.

dockerStrategy.description: pnpm-deploy: thin image via @thdk/nx-pnpm-deploy (single COPY, no install). pnpm-fetch: layered cache via @nx/js:prune-lockfile + workspace_modules + offline pnpm install.

port.description: Default port the framework starter listens on.

tags.description: Extra project tags (deployable:docker is added automatically when docker is true).
